Lines.Speaker: You
Lines.Text: Hey... you don't look so good. What happened?

Lines.Speaker: Sara
Lines.Text: It's my birthday today, but no one remembered... I'm a little hurt.

Choices.Text: Wait a second, I'll be right back.
Oh, I thought it was something serious.

Lines.Speaker: Sara
Lines.Text: Oh... I wasn't expecting this. Thank you so much <3
